---
name: Famous game suggestion
about: Nominate a legendary game for the daily calendar
title: '[game] Hero vs Opponent, Event Year'
labels: content, good first issue
---

**The game**: (players, event, year, result)

**Why it's legendary**: (one or two sentences — what's the story?)

**Hero + suggested window**: (whose shoes do we stand in, roughly which moves?)

**Movetext source**: (a public link where the bare moves can be verified —
Wikipedia game articles are ideal)

Want to add it yourself? See CONTRIBUTING.md — it's a config-file PR, no code.
